channel.title: Niri on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Niri on Arrans github.io

item.title: noctalia-dev/noctalia-shell
item.description: A sleek and minimal desktop shell thoughtfully crafted for Wayland.

item.title: andre-brandao/gpui-shell
item.description: Wayland desktop shell and status bar in Rust with GPUI, featuring a modular bar, launcher, and control center for Hyprland and Niri.
